x0.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the starting x-values of the line segments

y0.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the starting y-values of the line segments

x1.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the stopping x-values of the line segments

y1.description: A numeric vector or unit object indicating the stopping y-values of the line segments

plot.description: Input plotgardener plot to internally plot line segments relative to

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x0, y0, x1, or y1 are only given as numeric vectors

linecolor.description: A character value specifying segment line color

lwd.description: A numeric specifying segment line width

lty.description: A numeric specifying segment line type

lineend.description: A character value specifying line end style

linejoin.description: A character value specifying line join style

arrow.description: A list describing arrow heads to place at either end of the line segments, as produced by the grid arrow function

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
